goal: Future private-beta web interface for safe ai-humanizer upload workflows, before/after visualization, and report downloads.
disallowed_modes: No machine-pattern normalization for detection avoidance
difference_map_rules: visualize only measurable backend report changes or generated spectrogram-difference data
do not invent regions client-side unless they are clearly marked as visual-only
map highlighted areas to measured technical metrics only
forbidden_visual_labels: No UI label may say fingerprint removed
No UI label may say watermark removed
No UI label may say AI trace removed
No UI label may say detector bypassed
No UI label may say undetectable
No UI label may say hidden identifier removed
No UI label may say provenance removed
No UI label may say source attribution removed
No UI label may say C2PA removed

color_semantics.forbidden_implication: Do not use color to imply watermark, fingerprint, detector, provenance, origin, or source-attribution removal.

candidate_frontend_libraries.name: audioMotion-analyzer
candidate_frontend_libraries.license_note: AGPL-3.0 license requires separate approval before dependency use.

frontend_should_render: waveform from peaks or audio file
hover tooltips from backend-provided region metadata

architecture.backend: Python API wrapper around existing ai-humanizer CLI

security_requirements: no logging of full file contents
no committing uploaded audio or generated outputs

faq.question: What does this tool do?
faq.answer: It checks audio files for technical quality, metadata, release-readiness, and safe before/after differences. Some modes can create a processed output using conservative audio-quality settings.

faq.question: What does the spectrum view show?
faq.answer: It shows measurable energy distribution over time and frequency. The difference view highlights measurable technical changes between original and processed audio.

faq.question: Does a highlighted area mean a watermark or fingerprint was removed?
faq.answer: No. Highlighted areas only show measured technical differences such as peak, RMS, clipping, spectral centroid, spectral rolloff, stereo correlation, side energy, or metadata changes.

faq.question: Does it change my audio?
faq.answer: Analyze, release-check, inspect-metadata, and compare are read-only. Clean-metadata changes metadata only. Conservative humanize can create a processed audio output.

faq.question: Does it remove AI fingerprints or watermarks?
faq.answer: No. The tool does not remove watermarks, fingerprints, provenance, C2PA markers, source-attribution markers, or detector signals.

faq.question: Does it make AI music undetectable?
faq.answer: No. The tool is not designed to bypass detectors or mislead recognition systems.

faq.question: Is this mastering?
faq.answer: No. It provides technical reports and conservative processing. It does not guarantee platform acceptance or replace professional mastering.

faq.question: What happens to uploaded files?
faq.answer: Files are processed temporarily and deleted automatically after the retention period.

faq.question: Are reports included?
faq.answer: Yes. Reports can be generated as JSON and Markdown.

future_implementation_milestone: v0.13.1 Web Upload Visualization MVP Implementation
